title: perf: audit quick-wins (CI scan prune, what_if grid cap, upload decimation, DB indexes, live-monitor cap)
intent: Implements the confirmed+cheap subset of the read-only PERFORMANCE_AUDIT_2026-07-04.md one-hour fix list. Each change is bounded and backed by a measurement in the audit report. Item 5 (rosette JSON->SQLite store migration) is intentionally deferred to a separate PR due to data-continuity risk.

diff_articulation.what_changed: (1) Two governance tree scanners switched from unpruned SERVICES.rglob('*.py') to an os.walk with in-place PRUNE_DIRS pruning (mirrors scripts/check_dxf_compat.py:iter_python_files), so they no longer descend into services/api/.venv/site-packages; each went from a 120s CI timeout to ~1.5-2.5s. (2) /api/cam/opt/what_if rejects grid axes above MAX_WHATIF_GRID_AXIS=12 with a 400, bounding the O(grid*moves) optimizer that ran ~10s at 20x20. (3) /api/cam/sim/upload decimates its returned moves preview to max_moves (default 5000) unless include_moves=true, bounding the previously-unbounded ~7-70 MB payload; move_count and stats still reflect the full path. (4) rmos_db adds preventive strip_families + composite (filter, created_at DESC) indexes (SQLite + PG), SCHEMA_VERSION 3->4, all idempotent CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS. (5) useLiveMonitorStore caps the events array to a 500-entry ring buffer. Tests added for the grid cap and upload decimation.
diff_articulation.why_not_redundant: Each item removes a distinct, measured cost path (CI wall-clock, request-thread latency, response payload size, unbounded frontend memory) documented in PERFORMANCE_AUDIT_2026-07-04.md. None is a cosmetic refactor; the two API changes are backward-compatible (default grid unchanged; small uploads return every move) and covered by new tests.

commands_run: pytest tests/test_simulation_endpoint_smoke.py -q -> 30 passed, 8 xfailed (incl. decimation + full-fidelity opt-in)
pytest -k 'store or rmos_db or sqlite' -q -> 154 passed
EXPLAIN QUERY PLAN on a v4 DB: strip_families filters index-backed; get_all/filtered-list queries no longer TEMP B-TREE sort

files.behavior_change: Scanner no longer descends into dependency dirs; scans same real repo source, ~50x faster. No change to violations reported.
Scanner no longer descends into dependency dirs; scans same real repo source, ~80x faster. No change to violations reported.

files.intent: Cap the /opt/what_if grid axis to bound optimizer cost.
files.behavior_change: grid axis > 12 now returns 400; default 6x6 and all valid grids unchanged.

files.intent: Add preventive strip_families + composite created_at indexes; bump SCHEMA_VERSION to 4.
files.behavior_change: Additive idempotent indexes on SQLite and PG init; applied to existing DBs on next open; no data migration, no query change.

files.intent: Decimate the /api/cam/sim/upload moves preview to bound payload.
files.behavior_change: Large uploads return a decimated moves preview + moves_returned/moves_decimated fields; include_moves=true restores full fidelity; small uploads and move_count/stats unchanged.

files.intent: Bound the LiveMonitor event buffer to a 500-entry ring buffer.
files.behavior_change: events[] retains only the most recent 500; eventCounts remain true cumulative totals.

files.intent: Cover upload decimation + full-fidelity opt-in + small-path passthrough.
The read-only audit report that motivates and measures these fixes.

architecture_scan.acknowledgement_notes: All changes bounded, measured, and backward-compatible. Item 5 (rosette store migration) deferred to a separate PR for data-continuity review.
